channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 3 promesse che ogni CIO dovrebbe mantenere nel 2025
item.description: Quasi tutte le novità tecnologiche dell’anno scorso erano legate all’AI generativa, che è stata talmente pubblicizzata nel 2023 che ogniazienda ha dovuto provarla in uno o più progetti nel corso del 2024.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Wisconsin man charged with arson of congressman’s office over TikTok ban
item.description: Prosecutors charged a Wisconsin man who allegedly told police he tried to burn down a congressman’s office because he was upset with the federal TikTok ban with multiple counts on Wednesday, including arson.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Musk clashes with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over Trump-supported Stargate AI data center project
item.description: Elon Musk is clashing with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over the Stargate artificial intelligence infrastructure project touted by President Donald Trump, the latest in a feud between the two tech billionaires that started on OpenAI's board and is now testing Musk's influence with the new president.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Instagram courts TikTok creators with cash bonuses up to $50,000
item.description: TikTok is not only battling for survival this week but also facing fierce competition from rivals eager to poach its top influencers. Among them is Meta’s Instagram, reportedly offering cash bonuses to lure big TikTok creators to its platform, Reels.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Will Samsung's new Galaxy AI features come to older devices? Here's what we know
item.description: Samsung unveiled a slew of Galaxy AI features for its new Galaxy S25 lineup, but how many of them are likely to trickle down to older handsets?
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Apple gender-discrimination lawsuit that allegedly started with man’s tax form left on printer gets boost from judge
item.description: Apple -- worth more than $3 trillion in the stock market and led by CEO Tim Cook, who received $74.6 million in pay last year -- sought to kill the lawsuit.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: This obscure vendor is challenging mighty HP to the title of most powerful mini PC ever with a Ryzen AI Max+ 395 product
item.description: GMKTec's Ryzen AI Max+ 395 mini PC hopes to set a new standard in AI performance, challenging Nvidia and Intel.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Musk clashes with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over Trump-supported Stargate AI data center project
item.description: It's the latest clash in a feud between the two tech billionaires that started on OpenAI’s board and is now testing Musk’s influence with the new president.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump pardons Ross Ulbricht, Texas-born founder of dark web marketplace website
item.description: President Donald Trump has pardoned Ross Ulbricht, the founder of Silk Road, an underground website for selling drugs.
item.dc:creator: Chris Megerian, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump administration shuts down White House Spanish-language page and social media
item.description: Within hours of President Donald Trump’s inauguration, the new administration took down the Spanish-language version of the official White House website. The site — currently https://www.whitehouse.gov/es/ — now gives users an “Error 404” message.
item.dc:creator: FERNANDA FIGUEROA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Tech titans sound off on Trump's AI project
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump Executive Order Threatens Santa Cruz EV Charging Station Grant
item.description: President Trump's executive order jeopardizes a federal grant to install electric vehicle charging stations in Santa Cruz and Monterey counties.
item.dc:creator: Pk Hattis, The Mercury News

item.title: Copilot AI comes to Microsoft 365 plans: Everything you need to know
item.description: If you’re a Microsoft 365 subscriber with a Personal or Family subscription, Microsoft just flipped a switch and activated Copilot AI features for your account. It’s a new part of your subscription, along with that 1TB of OneDrive storage and access to Office apps like Word and Excel.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: These tech leaders have jobs in the Trump administration
item.description: President Trump has been tapping a number of tech executives for a range of roles in his second administration over the past few months. Now, the first week of Trump’s second term, his cabinet is powering through confirmation hearings and unofficial advisors are assuming their posts.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: AI experiment in halfpipe judging at X Games will give snowboarders a glimpse into the future
item.description: The X Games will experiment judging halfpipe runs this week in Aspen using artificial intelligence, the cutting-edge technology that could someday play a role in the way subjectively judged sports are scored.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Auto-followed Trump on Facebook? It's probably because you previously liked the POTUS account
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Some Facebook and Instagram users were surprised to find themselves automatically following the accounts of President Donald Trump or Vice President JD Vance this week after the president was inaugurated — but that's likely because they had previously followed official U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sony Enters Electric Vehicle Market with Afeela 1
item.description: Sony's new electric vehicle, the Afeela 1, promises to redefine the driving experience with advanced technology and entertainment features.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump, a populist president, is flanked by tech billionaires at his inauguration
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Some of the most exclusive seats at President Donald Trump’s inauguration on Monday were reserved for powerful tech CEOs who also happen to be among the world’s richest men.
item.dc:creator: ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: From devops to CTO: 5 things to start doing now
item.description: I was promoted to CTO in my late twenties, and while it is common to see young CTOs leading startups these days, it was unusual in the ’90s. I was far less experienced back then, and still developing my business acumen.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: TikTok app restored in US amid Trump assurances
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump plans to help the popular social media app TikTok stay in operation under his presidency.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: How TikTok grew from a fun app for teens into a potential national security threat
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — If it feels like TikTok has been around forever, that's probably because it has, at least if you're measuring via internet time.
item.dc:creator: DAVID HAMILTON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: That Apple ID disabled message? It's a dangerous scam
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy breaks down why those emails that warn that "Your Apple ID has been disabled" is most likely a scam. Here's how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: These mistakes could tank your credit score
item.description: Even small mistakes can negatively impact your credit score; here are some of the most common credit report errors and how you can fix them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
